summary: A Fox News studio interview clip of Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons discussing the Dallas facility sniper attack, with split-screen aerial graphics labeling the ICE facility and victims. It is a televised news interview, not a produced youth-appeal montage.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; 'ACTING ICE DIR: SNIPER FIRED INTO TX ICE FACILITY'; 'TODD LYONS | ACTING ICE DIRECTOR'
